item.title: Ok. Sorry about that break. As a reward for your patience, here's the 273st eromem album to kick off your Mjonday.
item.description:
Just realized it's been 3 weeks since my last horni album. That's untenable. But imma try and defend it anyway. I had shit going on, lol. So here's the next installment, thank you for your patience. As usual, no OC here, just things I've found in the wild lands.
Queck
Ahhhh *toe beans*! Dr.Bees says hello from his perch!
It's not porn! That's saved elsewhere. Let's talk about porn, actually. I like it. Big surprise. Many many many people do as well. Now. I will again specify I am not a DOCTOR, PSYCHOLOGIST, OR PSYCHIATRIST, but in my own experience, porn can get in the way of a good time. It alters your view of a healthy sex life and makes gratification so finely tailored to your needs that you have a hard time enjoying the actual quality time you have to spend with others. Porn can be an addiction. I fully advocate enjoying porn, I think it's fun and a great way to find new things you may not be ready to dive into in your personal sex life. But like all gratification, be mindful of your consumption. You have to moderate your enjoyment and not lose touch with your life or your *partner's* wants/needs. Ok, that's it for today. Heres the archive! May your way be Green and Golden. https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG PS: And again. Big thank you to all the support I recieved as I got noisy at the staff and mods about suspensions and lack of transparency. I am still hoping to have a *conversation* with them about the experience so we can make this platform a little better.
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: Schools and how they often handle bullying
item.description: Note: I didn't create this image, so credit to who even made this. Putting it here so I can share it on a reddit discussion where I can't upload images directly.

item.dc:creator: OhIfIMust

item.title: Charlie was the best dog. Now every Feb 20th will be King Charles day and I will spoil every dog I see.
item.description:
I always knew this day would come but I never wanted to be without him. He had this collar from day 1, Valentine’s Day 2013. Best present I ever gave myself. I wouldn’t take it back for all the money in the world. My boy Charlie brought everything to my life. Please adopt a dog, they give you so much.
If you want to see him when he was younger. https://imgur.com/gallery/hoM3LFn
item.dc:creator: getridofTheSeaword

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
never been a big fan of the taste or hangovers of wine
if you play your cards right
i wonder what the heart breaking into 2 pieces represents
pretty sure that's not supposed to happen
nothin wrong with that
more power to her. farting gives you power.
dislike
toads look dirtier
i'll disgust both of you again and you'll like it
pretty much
stay out wimps!!
i'm sorry what
this did not age well
and the problem is?
mmm hmm
how can we be sure?
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: There are More Things in Heaven and Earth, Horatio, Than are Dreamt of in Your Philosophy" –Shakespeare's Hamlet
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: In 7+ years of indie game dev, we have never once sold out at a con, until now.
item.description:
I've been doing tabletop indie game dev since 2018 and have been to dozens of conventions and conferences. Never have I ever once sold out at an event...until now!
Sold over 7 boxes! When we first arrived I thought to myself, "oh man I definitely brought too many" I've been to so many cons where I've only sold like 5-10 games and left with a bittersweet taste in my mouth. Yes the people I met were amazing and I was able to have my games enjoyed by them, but it all felt like such a waste of time...
The person who I sold my final copy to. The game was so popular that I even ended up selling my demo copies at 50% off!
People even wanted my signature on the games
item.dc:creator: sysifuscorp
